case_title: TAYLOR, CAROLE vs. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, CAROLE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-24-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-25-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-04-1993
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, CAROLE
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-24-1993, CONTINUED TO OCT-21-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ARB-3 SENT OUT; REJECT DATE OF 6/15/93; REC'D NAMES OF WILLIAM A. ROBLES, JOSEPH C. SANTANA, PATRICIA A. MEAGHER AS ARBITRATORS.
DEFENDANT REJECTS PATRICIA A. MEAGHER AS ARBITRATOR.
JOSEPH C. SANTANA CHOSEN AS ARBITRATOR BY COIN TOSS; ARB-5 SENT OUT; 300 = 10/13/93; SC = 11/16/93.
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, ENTER JUDGMENT ON NOV-01-1993
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-21-1993, CONTINUED TO NOV-16-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, CAROLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $6,800.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,800.00, STATUTORY COST OF SUIT ARE: AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF.
CASE REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION JUDGMENT ENTERED 11/2/93.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, CAROLE
